name: violation-done-pending-without-integration
description: DONE_PENDING_WITHOUT_INTEGRATION_INTENT. Review approved (status=done) but integration_state=pending with no integration intent row. This is the critical post-approval seam the audit identified: a crash between review approval and integration intent creation leaves the task in an unclaimable state. Before Slice 5 introduces the integration_rows table, this is also the state when a reviewer process dies immediately after worker_done(verdict=approved) on a git_change task.
